creator: zarychtam@plan-b.pwste.edu.pl
text:
Maybe I haven't explained it clearly. What crashes apache24 is log rotation, not SIGUSR1 received, since it's probably already dead when notifications are sent[1]. Nevertheless, the error[1] occurs only with some rotations.

[1]
# newsyslog 
newsyslog: can't notify daemon, pid 2650 = /var/run/httpd.pid: No such process
